mnemonics: Sri Nandi Navigates Data Structures (S.N.N.D.S.) - Imagine a sacred bull (Nandi) guiding you through a well-organized temple of data, where each pillar is a different data structure from the publication.
keyPoints: Sri Nandi Publications is a source of educational material for learning data structures.
The content in Module 5 covers specific, foundational data structure concepts.
It is important to study the provided examples and exercises to understand implementation.
commonMistakes: Confusing Sri Nandi Publications' material with another publisher's content or a different module.
Skipping the practical exercises and only reading the theoretical concepts.
Misinterpreting the specific algorithms or code snippets presented in the publication.
